Class Customer

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.model.Customer
public class Customer extends Object
Represents a Customer in the flight booking system. Manages customer information and their bookings.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Customer(int id, String name, String phone, String email)
    Creates a new Customer with the specified details.

  • Constructor Details

    • Customer

      public Customer(int id, String name, String phone, String email)
      Creates a new Customer with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique customer ID
      name - the customer's name
      phone - the customer's phone number
      email - the customer's email address

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Retrieves the customer ID.
      Returns:
      the customer ID

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Retrieves the customer's name.
      Returns:
      the customer's name

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Retrieves the customer's phone number.
      Returns:
      the customer's phone number

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Retrieves the customer's email address.
      Returns:
      the customer's email address

    • isDeleted

      public boolean isDeleted()
      Checks if the customer is marked as deleted.
      Returns:
      true if customer is deleted, false otherwise

    • setDeleted

      public void setDeleted(boolean deleted)
      Sets the deleted status of the customer.
      Parameters:
      deleted - true to mark as deleted, false otherwise

    • setName

      public void setName(String name) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Sets the customer's name. Validates that the name doesn't contain the data delimiter.
      Parameters:
      name - the customer's name
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if name contains invalid characters

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Sets the customer's phone number. Validates that the phone doesn't contain the data delimiter.
      Parameters:
      phone - the customer's phone number
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if phone contains invalid characters

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Sets the customer's email address. Validates that the email doesn't contain the data delimiter.
      Parameters:
      email - the customer's email address
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if email contains invalid characters

    • getBookings

      public List<Booking> getBookings()
      Retrieves an unmodifiable list of all bookings for this customer.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of bookings

    • addBooking

      public void addBooking(Booking booking) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Adds a booking to this customer's booking list. Prevents duplicates: customer cannot have two ACTIVE bookings for the same trip (same outbound and same return flight status).
      Parameters:
      booking - the booking value to add
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if booking is null or is a duplicate trip

    • removeBooking

      public void removeBooking(Booking booking) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Removes a booking from this customer's booking list. Used by cancel/update flows.
      Parameters:
      booking - the booking value to remove
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if booking is null or not found

    • findBookingByFlightId

      public Booking findBookingByFlightId(int flightId)
      Finds an active booking that includes the given flight ID as either outbound or return. Useful for supporting cancellation by passing either flight ID.
      Parameters:
      flightId - the flight ID to search for
      Returns:
      the booking containing the flight, or null if not found

    • isAlreadyOnFlight

      public boolean isAlreadyOnFlight(int flightId)
      Checks if this customer is already a passenger on the specified flight. Only checks ACTIVE bookings.
      Parameters:
      flightId - the flight ID to check
      Returns:
      true if customer is on the flight, false otherwise

    • getDetailsLong

      public String getDetailsLong()
      Returns a detailed string representation of the customer.
      Returns:
      detailed customer information

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the customer.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      customer summary string
